## Feature

What would you like Instagram Detailed List Viewer to support?

## Use Case

What are you trying to understand from your Instagram data export?

## Relevant List Type

- Followers
- Following
- Not-following-back comparison
- Snapshot comparison
- AI-powered insights
- Other:

## Why It Matters

Explain how this would make Instagram export analysis easier, safer, or clearer.

## Privacy Notes

Would this feature involve sensitive data, AI processing, or exported files that need extra care?
